TextView.android:text:
Small Phone Bill Application

Daniel Huynh
Professor Whitlock
Project 5
August 7th, 2024


This Program is an android app that allows users to create and store PhoneCall objects into Phonebills using an android emulator.

Navigate the homescreen to add / display calls.

**Phonecalls have a special format that need to be followed**

Caller: Callers must be 10 digit numbers with no special characters, please include dashes in the input.

Callee: Calle's must also be 10 digit numbers including dashes with no special characters.

Begin Date: The format for the date must be numbers only, do not spell out months. Years will always have to be 4 digit numbers.

Begin Time: The Time format will be a 12 hour clock using AM/PM.

End Dates and Times will follow the same format.

Example:"555-555-5555" "444-444-4444" 3/2/2024 12:00 PM 3/2/24 1:00 PM
